title: Calamagrostis robusta
taxonomy: Calamagrostis robusta is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. It belongs to the genus Calamagrostis, which includes several species of grasses. The species Calamagrostis robusta is a type of perennial grass native to certain regions. It is further classified into the subfamily Pooideae and the tribe Poeae. Calamagrostis robusta is also known as a robust meadow grass due to its growth and characteristics.

The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may have benefits for human health.
